name: wfm-controlm
description: Workforce Management Job Scheduling & Orchestration Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:deploy: cd backend && node node_modules\prisma\build\index.js migrate deploy
scripts.db:bootstrap: npm run db:bootstrap:ddl && npm run db:bootstrap:dml
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
